title: Senior Full Stack Engineer - Remote
description: Job Description Job Title: Senior Full Stack Engineer Job Type: Contract Location: Remote Job Summary: In this role, you'll apply your expertise to help train next-generation AI systems. Your work will shape how models learn, reason, and perform through high-quality, real-world input. No prior experience in AI is required — your domain knowledge is what matters. Key Responsibilities Design, develop, test, and maintain robust web applications using NodeJS, Typescript, Python, JavaScript, and JAVA. Collaborate closely with cross-functional team members to define and deliver technical solutions. Optimize applications for maximum speed, scalability, and maintainability. Participate in code reviews, architecture discussions, and provide mentorship to peers. Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve technical issues efficiently. Contribute to both backend and frontend feature development, ensuring high-quality user experiences. Communicate complex technical concepts clearly in both written and verbal formats. Required Skills And Qualifications 3+ years of proven experience as a Full-stack developer working with NodeJS, Typescript, Python, JavaScript, and JAVA. Expertise in building and consuming RESTful APIs. Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail. Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Ability to work independently and as part of a distributed remote team. Solid understanding of software development best practices and Agile methodologies. Experience with version control systems such as Git. Preferred Qualifications Familiarity with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, or GCP). Experience working with microservices and containerization technologies. Previous experience collaborating with global teams and stakeholders.

title: PHP Developer - BackEnd (Remote)
description: Role: PHP Developer - BackEnd (Remote) Location: Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type: Contract Payout: $30 - $110/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a PHP Back End Developer to work on a contract basis implementing and maintaining core backend services for high-traffic web applications. The role involves developing and optimizing server-side logic to ensure scalability and performance of applications handling significant user interaction. Key Responsibilities: • Develop and maintain PHP-based backend services and APIs to support web application functionality. • Optimize existing codebase for performance, security, and scalability. • Collaborate with frontend developers to integrate user-facing elements with server-side logic. • Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented PHP code following industry best practices. • Debug and troubleshoot issues across the application stack, including database queries and API endpoints. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Minimum 3 years of experience in PHP development with strong proficiency in PHP 7.x or 8.x. • Experience with PHP frameworks such as Laravel, Symfony, or CodeIgniter. • Proficiency in MySQL or PostgreSQL database design and optimization. • Experience with RESTful API development and integration. • Familiarity with version control systems, preferably Git. • Knowledge of server environments (Linux/Unix) and deployment workflows. • Experience with caching mechanisms (Redis, Memcached) and background job processing. • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently in a remote setting. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of scalable backend systems powering a widely used platform. The position requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: PHP/Laravel Yazılım Uzmanı & Mobil APP
description: Oyuncu ve model ajansı olarak faaliyet gösteren yapımız bünyesinde; ajans yönetim panelleri, oyuncu–model başvuru sistemleri, kullanıcı ve içerik yönetimi altyapıları ile web ve mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerini birlikte yürütecek deneyimli bir Yazılım Uzmanı ile freelance ve proje bazlı iş birliği hedeflenmektedir. Bu pozisyon tam zamanlı bir işe alım değildir. Belirli projelerde, uzun vadeli ve sürdürülebilir bir iş birliği anlayışıyla çalışılması amaçlanmaktadır. Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde aktif olarak geliştirilmekte ve güncellenmektedir. Ayrıca; oyuncu ve model ajansı dışında, reklam ve dijital projeler üreten ayrı bir yapımız bulunmaktadır. Dileyen adaylarla bu yapı altında da ek freelance yazılım projeleri gerçekleştirilebilecektir. Görev ve Sorumluluklar Mevcut web tabanlı yönetim panellerinin geliştirilmesi ve yeniden yapılandırılması AngularJS tabanlı admin panel altyapılarının bakımı, geliştirilmesi ve modern backend mimarileri ile entegrasyonu Mevcut backend yapılarının Laravel framework’ü ile yeniden kurgulanması ve iyileştirilmesi Oyuncu & model başvuru sistemleri, ajans içi yönetim panelleri ve özel modüllerin geliştirilmesi Web projelerle entegre çalışan mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak Mobil uygulamalar için gerekli backend servislerinin ve RESTful API’lerin geliştirilmesi AWS veya benzeri cloud sunucu altyapılarında kurulum, taşıma, yönetim ve performans optimizasyonu Üçüncü parti servisler, ödeme sistemleri ve harici API entegrasyonlarının yürütülmesi WordPress tabanlı kullanıcı arayüzleri ile özel yazılım sistemleri arasında entegrasyon sağlanması Aranan Nitelikler PHP & MySQL konusunda ileri seviye bilgi sahibi Laravel framework’ü ile aktif ve profesyonel proje tecrübesi olan AngularJS veya benzeri JavaScript tabanlı admin panel yapılarıyla çalışma deneyimi Legacy sistemlerin modern framework’lere (özellikle Laravel) taşınması konusunda tecrübeli Mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde deneyimli (Flutter, React Native veya benzeri teknolojilerle geliştirme yapmış ya da bu süreçleri backend tarafında uçtan uca yönetmiş) Mobil uygulamalarla entegre çalışan backend servisleri ve API’ler geliştirmiş AWS veya benzeri sunucu sistemlerinde (EC2, S3, RDS vb.) deneyimli HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap teknolojilerine hâkim API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerinde tecrübeli Minimum 5 yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme tecrübesi Freelance ve proje bazlı çalışma disiplinine uygun Sorumluluk sahibi, güvenilir ve çözüm odaklı Teknik dokümanları okuyabilecek düzeyde İngilizce bilgisi İş Birliği ve Ödeme Modeli Çalışma modeli freelance ve proje bazlıdır İş başlangıcında karşılıklı sözleşme yapılır Ödemeler, proje teslimi ve test süreçlerinin onaylanmasının ardından gerçekleştirilir Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde düzenli olarak geliştirilmektedir Uzun vadeli, karşılıklı güvene dayalı iş birlikleri önceliklidir

title: Software Engineer ( Backend-Python)
description: Company Canaria is a technology startup providing high-quality, large-scale labor market data to the B2B market. Our mission is to power the next generation of solutions in recruitment, HR analytics, workforce planning, lead generation, healthcare, academic research, and finance by delivering the most comprehensive and accurate job market data available. Our advanced data mining, computing optimizations, and state-of-the-art NLP techniques let us process job market data at scale: over 1 billion unique job postings drawn from 200,000+ data sources, with 100+ fields per record. Our clients use this data to understand market trends, identify skill gaps, and connect people with the right opportunities. What You Will Do Own the design and implementation of robust data pipelines that form the backbone of our product. Design and operate the databases behind that product, across relational and non-relational models. Build and deploy scalable, cloud-native and serverless services on our cloud platform. Use containerization (Docker, and Kubernetes where it fits) to streamline deployment and operations. Ensure system quality through stress, integration, and end-to-end testing. Write clean, maintainable, well-documented code. Collaborate with engineers, data scientists, and product managers. Who You Are (Required) 3+ years building production backend or data-intensive systems. Bachelor's in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience. Highly proficient in Python and comfortable in a Unix environment (scripting and application development). Solid experience with at least one relational database (e.g. PostgreSQL) and at least one NoSQL store (e.g. MongoDB or Redis). Hands-on experience with at least one major cloud platform (AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure). Comfortable containerizing and deploying applications with Docker. Nice to Have Experience designing scalable back-end systems for data-intensive workloads. Kubernetes in production. Aerospike or other high-throughput key-value stores. RESTful API design and optimization. CI/CD pipelines and automated testing frameworks. Monitoring and logging tools (e.g. Prometheus, Grafana). Big data warehouses (BigQuery, Redshift). Asynchronous programming in Python. Web scraping (Scrapy) and browser automation (Playwright). Benefits High-end laptop. Annual performance bonus. Work with global teams (US, EU). Founders and colleagues with FAANG and top-institution backgrounds. Access to powerful on-prem and cloud compute for research. Professional development and growth opportunities. Hiring Process First call about the role & expectations (15 mins) Basic Python coding interview (1 hour) Technical interview (1 hour)

title: Senior Backend Engineer, Core APIs
description: This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Senior Backend Engineer, Core APIs based in Turkey. Join a globally distributed engineering team building high-performance backend systems that power large-scale, real-time applications. In this role, you'll design and optimize scalable APIs and distributed services that support mission-critical fraud detection technology used by organizations worldwide. You'll own features from architecture through deployment while collaborating with talented engineers across multiple disciplines in a fully remote environment. This is an opportunity to solve complex technical challenges involving scalability, performance, and reliability while working with modern technologies and cloud-native architectures. If you're passionate about backend engineering, distributed systems, and continuous improvement, you'll find an environment that values technical excellence, autonomy, and knowledge sharing. Accountabilities Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend systems and APIs capable of processing large volumes of real-time data with high reliability and performance. Build, optimize, and enhance distributed services while ensuring seamless integration across platform components. Investigate complex technical issues through root cause analysis, experimentation, and performance testing to deliver effective engineering improvements. Monitor, debug, and optimize backend services to maintain system stability, scalability, and operational efficiency. Collaborate closely with cross-functional engineering teams to deliver robust, production-ready solutions. Participate in a shared on-call rotation, contributing to operational excellence and rapid incident resolution. Promote engineering best practices, contribute to a data-driven development culture, and mentor junior engineers to support their technical growth. Requirements 5+ years of professional experience in backend software engineering. Strong hands-on experience with Go (Golang) and/or Node.js, with a willingness to work across both technologies. Proven expertise designing, building, and maintaining scalable backend systems, APIs, microservices, and real-time processing platforms. Solid understanding of distributed systems architecture, scalability challenges, and performance optimization techniques. Strong experience working with SQL databases and technologies such as DynamoDB, Redis, Elasticsearch, or similar data storage solutions. Proficiency with modern software engineering practices, including Git, CI/CD pipelines, shell scripting, and development tools. Excellent English communication skills with experience collaborating effectively in fully remote, international teams. Ability to work independently while contributing to collaborative engineering initiatives. Passion for mentoring teammates and fostering a culture of continuous learning. Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science or a related field, or equivalent practical experience, is preferred. Experience with Terraform, AWS CloudFormation, ClickHouse, Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Databricks, Datadog, Docker, Kubernetes, TypeScript, Express, or dbt is considered a strong advantage. Familiarity with internet security, privacy technologies, open-source development, and asynchronous collaboration is highly desirable. Benefits Fully remote position with the flexibility to work from anywhere in India. Opportunity to solve challenging large-scale engineering problems using modern backend technologies. Work within a globally distributed engineering team focused on collaboration, innovation, and technical excellence. Exposure to cutting-edge distributed systems, cloud-native infrastructure, and real-time data processing. Strong culture of knowledge sharing, mentorship, and continuous professional development. Participation in impactful engineering projects with significant ownership and autonomy. Inclusive and diverse work environment that values different perspectives and backgrounds. Competitive compensation aligned with experience and local market conditions. Flexible work environment designed to support work-life balance. How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Backend Developer
description: Sorumluluklar Laravel Framework üzerinde modüler ve ölçeklenebilir backend geliştirmek RESTful API ve entegrasyon servislerini tasarlamak, geliştirmek ve dokümante etmek Veritabanı tasarımı, optimizasyonu ve performans iyileştirmelerini yapmak Üçüncü taraf servisler ve pazar yerleri (Trendyol, Hepsiburada, Amazon, Etsy vb.) ile entegrasyon süreçlerini yönetmek Kod kalitesi, güvenlik ve test standartlarını uygulamak Takım ile Agile/Scrum süreçlerine aktif katılım sağlamak DevOps süreçlerine (CI/CD, versiyonlama, deployment) katkı sunmak Nitelikler PHP ve Laravel Framework konusunda en az 3 yıl deneyim MySQL veya PostgreSQL veritabanları konusunda güçlü bilgi API geliştirme ve entegrasyon deneyimi Git versiyon kontrol sistemine hakimiyet Temiz kod yazma, SOLID prensipleri ve design pattern bilgisi Tercihen Docker, Redis, Queue sistemleri (Horizon, RabbitMQ, SQS) deneyimi Tercihen önceden e-ticaret altyapısı veya SaaS projelerinde görev almış olmak Takım çalışmasına yatkın, iletişim becerileri güçlü Bizimle Çalışmanın Avantajları Yeni nesil e-ticaret altyapısının çekirdek ekibinde yer alma fırsatı Yenilikçi ve hızlı büyüyen bir projede kariyer geliştirme imkanı Dinamik, genç ve vizyoner bir ekip kültürü

title: Junior Backend Developer
description: 🚜 About Lely Innovation has been part of Lely's DNA since its foundation in 1948. With a focus on solving farming problems, Lely has become the leader in robotics and farm management we know today with over 1,600 active patents. Lely Turkey Software Development is based in Istanbul but delivers solutions to all of our group entities globally, developing the farm management software “Lely Horizon” that Lely farmers with over 57,000 Lely robots use in more than 45 countries. At Lely Turkey Software Development, we work together with our Dutch colleagues using new technologies such as Cloud Computing, the latest and greatest JavaScript Frameworks, Machine Learning, Continuous Development and Continuous Integration, Container Management Platforms, Edge Computing, and Automated Testing. If you're looking for a company where you will be challenged, respected, valued and that's invested in your personal development, this is a great opportunity for you. We are looking for a "Junior Backend Developer" who will drive impact within our dynamic, energetic team and shape our people-first workplace culture. Come and shape the future with us! İş Tanımı 🎯 About The Role In this role, you will join TeamMooFit as a Junior Back-End Developer , playing an active part in supporting the ongoing development of Horizon, Lely’s core farm management solution deployed to tens of thousands of dairy farms across the globe. This role offers a unique opportunity to drive business impact by aligning technical capabilities with software goals, contributing to Lely Turkey’s continued growth and success. What is your role? Supporting the ongoing development of Horizon, Lely’s farm management solution, that is deployed to tens of thousands of dairy farms across the globe Obtaining and maintaining an in-depth understanding of dairy farm business processes Implementing new features and maintaining the existing code base Improving the overall architecture of the Horizon application by for example modularization Identifying performance bottlenecks and implementing performance improvements Guaranteeing high code quality by for example performing code reviews and implementing unit tests Providing technical leadership to teammates through coaching and mentorship Participating in detailed project planning and design reviews Translating functional requirements into technical requirements Identifying and disseminating “best practice” in development and maintenance of applications and systems Writing technical documentation on implemented features and APIs Nitelikler ⚡ What is your experience? Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science/Engineering or related area Proficient with C#, ASP.NET Core, .Net Framework, .Net Core Experience working with RDBMS and NoSQL databases Excellent knowledge on RESTful API Development Familiarity with source control tools (git) Experience in building and maintaining CI/CD Pipelines Experience in Agile Scrum software development process Experience with Unit Testing Experience with message brokers (RabbitMQ or Azure Service Bus) is a plus Cloud computing experience is a plus (Azure, AWS) Familiarity with Azure DevOps is a plus Experience developing microservices is a plus Excellent communication and interpersonal skills Fluency in English both spoken and written Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills Open to learning new technologies Ek Bilgiler ✨ Why join Lely? At Lely, we offer more than just a job — we offer an environment where you can grow, innovate, and create meaningful impact. As part of our team, you will have the opportunity to work in a global, innovation-driven company that is shaping the future of robotic farming while being empowered to bring your ideas to life in a collaborative and people-focused culture. Here’s what you can expect: A meaningful role in an international company driving innovation in 45+ countries worldwide Close collaboration with colleagues in the Netherlands and across the globe, offering daily exposure to diverse perspectives and cultures Extensive learning and development opportunities through Lely Academy, customized English courses, and an annual training budget to support your professional growth A friendly, dynamic, and collaborative working environment where your ideas are valued Space, autonomy, and support to innovate, improve, and implement new initiatives Wellbeing programs and social clubs including fitAtLely, breathwork, mindfulness, yoga, book reading etc. Social connection through monthly indoor and outdoor team events Private health insurance Company-contributed private pension plan (BES) 3 additional paid leave days each year Birthday gift cards Communication allowance Transportation allowance Daily breakfast, lunch, and snacks Newborn and wedding gifts, and more If you're looking for a company where you will be challenged, respected, valued and that's invested in your personal development, this is a great opportunity for you. Ready to Feed the Future? Join us and help shape the future of farming.

title: Senior Backend Developer
description: COLIN’S'te Biz, "Sadece hazır giyim işinde değil; ürün ve hizmetlerimizle insanları daha iyi hissettirme işindeyiz." Birlikte ilerleyip birlikte gelişmek için, bu misyonu paylaşan tutkulu ekibimize katılmak ve keyifli yolculuğumuzda yer almak ister misin? Öyleyse… 🌍 24 Ülke ve 600'den fazla mağazamız ile Colin's takımımızın değerli bir üyesi olma fırsatı, 🏡 Uzaktan çalışma imkanı, 🏢 İstediğin zaman ofiste yerin hazır! İleri teknoloji ile donatılmış, ilham veren muhteşem bir ofiste çalışma imkanı, 📈 Sana özel oluşturulan kariyer haritan ve gelişim planını destekleyecek sınırsız eğitim ve gelişim fırsatları, Colin's'te Seni bekliyor! Peki, Colin'slileri İyi Hissettirecek Ayrıcalıklar Neler? 🩺 Geniş kapsamlı tamamlayıcı sağlık sigortası, 🍎 Diyetisyen, psikolojik destek hizmeti, yıllık check-up muayenesi, diş muayene paketi ve tüm bu ayrıcalıkları, avantajlı fiyatlarla eş ve çocuklarına sunma imkanı. 🎓 Yüksek lisans eğitimin için %50'ye varan eğitim desteği, 💻 Dünyanın en büyük online eğitim platformları ile yabancı dil, mesleki ve kişisel gelişim eğitimlerinden sınırsız faydalanma ayrıcalığı, ⛹🏻 ♀️ Colin's'lilere özel spor salonu aboneliği ile yüzme, fitness, basketbol, tenis, bowling... ilgini çeken 60'tan çok branş ve 750'yi aşkın spor salonu ndan yararlanabileceğin sınırsız abonelik fırsatı, 🏐 Şirket bünyemizdeki voleybol, basketbol, bowling ve dragon bot takımı ile şirketler arası müsabakalara katılma imkanı, 🍽️ Sosyal alanımızda kahvaltı ayrıcalığı, "Happy Hour"lar, festivaller ve Colin's'lilere özel sürpriz ikramlar… 🛒 Mağazalarımızda, Colin's'liler için tanımlı %50'ye varan indirimli alışveriş fırsatı, 🎉 Gezi, Fotoğrafçılık, Sinema, Yabancı Dil… 30'dan çok ilgi alanına özel sosyal kulüp, 🏥 Yüzlerce sağlık kurumunda, online alışveriş siteleri ile mağaza ve hizmet veren kurumlardan, çalışanlar ve aileleri için tanımlanmış özel indirim ayrıcalığı. GENEL NİTELİKLER Üniversite eğitimini bilgisayar, yazılım, mühendislik vb. bölümlerinden biri üzerine tamamlamış, En az 5 yıldır yazılım geliştirme yapan, Mikroservis ve REST API tecrübesi olan, Javascript(Node.js) ve TypeScript (tercihen NestJS) ile proje geliştirmiş, SQL Server/PostgreSQL vb. RDBMS deneyimine sahip olup; T-SQL ile stored procedure, function, trigger yazabilen, MongoDB vb. NoSQL veritabanlarına aşina, Kafka, RabbitMQ gibi queue teknolojilerinden birinde tecrübesi olan, Redis veya benzeri caching mekanizmaları hakkında bilgi sahibi olan, Git, Jenkins vb. versiyon kontrol ve CI/CD araçları hakkında bilgi sahibi olan, Docker, Kubernetes gibi container teknolojilerine hakim olan, Analitik düşünebilen, çözüm odaklı ve ekip çalışmasına yatkın, İyi seviyede İngilizce bilgisi olan, ARANAN DİĞER NİTELİKLER Açık kaynak kod proje tecrübesi olan, Test süreçleriyle ilgili bilgi sahibi olan, Agile metodolojisiyle çalışmaya yatkın, CI/CD süreçleri hakkında bilgi sahibi olan, Azure DevOps, Jira gibi proje yönetim ve takip uygulamaları ile proje geliştirmiş, Cloud native geliştirme alışkanlığı olan, tercihen Microsoft Azure servisleriyle çalışmış, Event-driven architecture ve servisler arası iletişim konularında bilgi sahibi olan, Clean code, code review ve sürdürülebilir yazılım geliştirme prensiplerine önem veren, Performans, ölçeklenebilirlik, loglama ve izlenebilirlik konularına ilgi duyan, İŞ TANIMI Eroğlu Perakende Grubu bünyesinde geliştirilmekte olan backend servisleri ve web tabanlı/mobil uygulamalara yazılım geliştirmek ve bakım&destek süreçlerinden sorumlu olmak, Teknik sorumluluk alabilen, gerektiğinde çözüm alternatifleri üretebilen ve ekip arkadaşlarına teknik yönden katkı sağlayabilen, İş talepleri doğrultusunda, analiz, tasarım, kodlama ve birim test süreçlerini gerçekleştirmek, Projelerin teknik analizini ve implementasyonunu yapmak, yapılan işin dokümantasyonunu hazırlamak ve yaşatmak, Mikroservis mimarisiyle geliştirilen uygulamaların sürdürülebilir, ölçeklenebilir ve performanslı şekilde geliştirilmesine katkı sağlamak, RESTful API ve event-driven servislerin tasarımı, geliştirilmesi ve bakım süreçlerinde görev almak, SQL ve NoSQL veritabanları üzerinde veri modelleme, sorgu geliştirme ve performans iyileştirme süreçlerine katkı sağlamak, Yeni teknoloji, yöntem ve geliştirme pratiklerini takip ederek ekibin gelişimine ve projelere katkı sağlayabilecek, Teknolojiler Javascript Typescript Node.js / NestJS NoSQL(MongoDB) SQL Microservices RESTful WebServices Kafka / RabbitMQ Redis Docker Azure DevOps Cloud Native Services

title: Backend Developer
description: Job Overview Join Mindsite as a Backend Developer and help us build scalable, reliable, and high-performance backend systems powering our SaaS products. You will work closely with product, data, and engineering teams to design APIs, optimize databases, and contribute to the architecture of systems that process large-scale e-commerce data. What We’re Looking For 4+ years of experience in backend development. Strong proficiency in Python (must-have). Solid experience with PostgreSQL, including query optimization and database design. Experience designing and maintaining RESTful APIs and backend services. Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering, Management Information Systems (MIS), Computer Science, or a related field. Understanding of scalable backend architectures and distributed systems. Strong problem-solving skills and ability to write clean, maintainable code. Experience working in collaborative engineering teams and participating in code reviews. Go (Golang) experience is a plus, but not required. Experience working on AI-related projects is a strong plus. Experience with big data systems, data pipelines, or large-scale data processing is a strong plus. Fluency in English is a plus. In this role, you will: Develop and maintain backend services and APIs using Python. Design, optimize, and manage PostgreSQL databases. Build scalable systems capable of handling large volumes of data. Collaborate with product and engineering teams to deliver new features. Improve system performance, reliability, and observability. Participate in architecture discussions and technical decision-making. Contribute to code quality through testing, reviews, and best practices. Support integrations with internal and external systems. What We Offer: Competitive Compensation: Salary indexed to foreign currency rates, plus performance-based bonuses. Flexible Benefits: Health insurance, Apple devices, meal cards, therapy & wellness reimbursements, and more. Time Off That Respects You: 10+ vacation days plus your birthday off in your first year. A Culture That Builds Leaders: Join a driven, collaborative team shaping the future of e-commerce with industry leaders like P , Unilever, and Colgate-Palmolive. Endless Learning Opportunities: Work with modern technologies and continuously grow your engineering skills. About Mindsite Mindsite is a fast-growing SaaS company helping brands win online through actionable e-commerce analytics. From product availability and pricing to visibility and sentiment, we empower leading FMCG players with insights that fuel growth.

title: Junior Backend Developer
description: 🎯 About The Role In this role, you will join TeamMooFit as a Junior Back-End Developer , playing an active part in supporting the ongoing development of Horizon, Lely’s core farm management solution deployed to tens of thousands of dairy farms across the globe. This role offers a unique opportunity to drive business impact by aligning technical capabilities with software goals, contributing to Lely Turkey’s continued growth and success. What is your role? Supporting the ongoing development of Horizon, Lely’s farm management solution, that is deployed to tens of thousands of dairy farms across the globe Obtaining and maintaining an in-depth understanding of dairy farm business processes Implementing new features and maintaining the existing code base Improving the overall architecture of the Horizon application by for example modularization Identifying performance bottlenecks and implementing performance improvements Guaranteeing high code quality by for example performing code reviews and implementing unit tests Providing technical leadership to teammates through coaching and mentorship Participating in detailed project planning and design reviews Translating functional requirements into technical requirements Identifying and disseminating “best practice” in development and maintenance of applications and systems Writing technical documentation on implemented features and APIs ⚡ What is your experience? Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science/Engineering or related area Proficient with C#, ASP.NET Core, .Net Framework, .Net Core Experience working with RDBMS and NoSQL databases Excellent knowledge on RESTful API Development Familiarity with source control tools (git) Experience in building and maintaining CI/CD Pipelines Experience in Agile Scrum software development process Experience with Unit Testing Experience with message brokers (RabbitMQ or Azure Service Bus) is a plus Cloud computing experience is a plus (Azure, AWS) Familiarity with Azure DevOps is a plus Experience developing microservices is a plus Excellent communication and interpersonal skills Fluency in English both spoken and written Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills Open to learning new technologies ✨ Why join Lely? At Lely, we offer more than just a job — we offer an environment where you can grow, innovate, and create meaningful impact. As part of our team, you will have the opportunity to work in a global, innovation-driven company that is shaping the future of robotic farming while being empowered to bring your ideas to life in a collaborative and people-focused culture. Here’s What You Can Expect A meaningful role in an international company driving innovation in 45+ countries worldwide Close collaboration with colleagues in the Netherlands and across the globe, offering daily exposure to diverse perspectives and cultures Extensive learning and development opportunities through Lely Academy, customized English courses, and an annual training budget to support your professional growth A friendly, dynamic, and collaborative working environment where your ideas are valued Space, autonomy, and support to innovate, improve, and implement new initiatives Wellbeing programs and social clubs including fitAtLely, breathwork, mindfulness, yoga, book reading etc. Social connection through monthly indoor and outdoor team events Private health insurance Company-contributed private pension plan (BES) 3 additional paid leave days each year Birthday gift cards Communication allowance Transportation allowance Daily breakfast, lunch, and snacks Newborn and wedding gifts, and more If you're looking for a company where you will be challenged, respected, valued and that's invested in your personal development, this is a great opportunity for you. Ready to Feed the Future? Join us and help shape the future of farming. 🚜 About Lely Innovation has been part of Lely's DNA since its foundation in 1948. With a focus on solving farming problems, Lely has become the leader in robotics and farm management we know today with over 1,600 active patents. Lely Turkey Software Development is based in Istanbul but delivers solutions to all of our group entities globally, developing the farm management software “Lely Horizon” that Lely farmers with over 57,000 Lely robots use in more than 45 countries. At Lely Turkey Software Development, we work together with our Dutch colleagues using new technologies such as Cloud Computing, the latest and greatest JavaScript Frameworks, Machine Learning, Continuous Development and Continuous Integration, Container Management Platforms, Edge Computing, and Automated Testing. If you're looking for a company where you will be challenged, respected, valued and that's invested in your personal development, this is a great opportunity for you. We are looking for a "Junior Backend Developer" who will drive impact within our dynamic, energetic team and shape our people-first workplace culture. Come and shape the future with us!
